name: avatar
title: Avatar + AvatarGroup
description: Circular avatar — image or initials with a deterministic warm tone from `name`. `AvatarGroup` overlaps them with white keylines.

files.content:
Circular avatar — image or initials with a deterministic warm tone from `name`. `AvatarGroup` overlaps them with white keylines.

```jsx
<Avatar name="Ada Obi" size={36} />
<AvatarGroup><Avatar name="Ada Obi" /><Avatar name="Femi Alade" /></AvatarGroup>
```
